title: Maintain Rosie dedicated worktree upkeep loop
goal: Run repeatable Rosie gardening cycles with explicit lane scope, mainline integration gates, and deterministic logs.

steps.text: Review AJ priorities, active lane status, and latest partner/gardening logs.
Confirm active scope is the AJ-approved dedicated non-main Rosie lane (`rosies-garden`) and record scope verification.
Identify bounded gardening updates for this pass and record affected IDs.
Run `gardening-v2-checklist` and capture pass status before recommendations are finalized.
Run coverage auditing, policy-conflict detection, and safety-preflight checks; record outputs before review and integration.
When squad-loop or diary artifacts changed, run `rosie-retrospective-garden-review` and append recommendation outputs before the review pause.
Pause for AJ review before applying non-trivial updates or performing lane-to-main integration in the main worktree.
Apply approved lane updates, commit within lane scope only under AJ-approved authorization mode, and refresh partner, handoff, and gardening logs.
Execute approved lane-to-main integration in the main worktree, then sync updated main back onto `rosies-garden` and record residual risks.

acceptanceCriteria: Scope verification is recorded for the active upkeep pass
Partner and gardening logs capture affected IDs and decisions
Gardening v2 checklist status is recorded before execution
Coverage, policy-conflict, and safety-preflight checks are recorded and passing before lane-to-main integration
Retrospective gardening recommendations are recorded when diary/squad artifacts changed
No history-altering lane-to-main integration occurs without AJ review
Commit authorization mode is explicit for any commit-ready changes
Validation status is recorded after approved updates and sync
Rosie lane is synchronized with latest main baseline for the next pass

verification.text: Confirm partner context and handoff logs record lane scope, decisions, and approval mode
Confirm pack gardener log and gardening-events JSONL include phase label, affected IDs, and verification status
Confirm repository validation status and unresolved sync risks are recorded
